test.command: echo 'NOTE: ypricemagic test suite does not reliably run on macOS. Validation happens through ypricemagic-server Docker stack.'
test.note: Tests cannot run on macOS per services.yaml; validation is through the server Docker stack. This is a known pre-existing constraint, not a new failure.

typecheck.note: mypy crashes on macOS with AssertionError from typed_envs library (pre-existing issue, not caused by this PR). The same crash occurs on the reverted baseline (7715db84). Confirmed pre-existing: mypy crash exists before and after stablecoin changes. This is documented in mission AGENTS.md as 'Known Pre-Existing Issues'.

lint.output: All done! ✨ 🍰 ✨ 156 files would be left unchanged.

appliedUpdates.description: Added documentation for V2 fee correction pattern (Decimal(0.997)^(n-1) division after getAmountsOut to recover spot price) and deferred PriceResult import pattern for circular import avoidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit note that mypy crashes on macOS for this codebase due to typed_envs assertion error in fixup.py. The crash is pre-existing and not caused by PR changes. Workers should not spend time debugging this or treating it as a failure of their changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker 3e543055 reported this in skillFeedback. Verified by scrutiny validator: the same crash occurs on baseline (pre-PR) commit 7715db84. Currently documented in mission AGENTS.md but not in the python-lib-worker skill.
